creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
just found one of the most amazing view in #Sichuan #china ✨❄️❄️🏔️🍂✨

📍#黃龍 Huanglong national park is known for its colorful travertine pools formed by calcite a form of terrestrial limestone deposited around mineral springs  especially in Huanglonggou (Yellow Dragon Gully), as well as diverse forest ecosystems, snow-capped peaks, waterfalls and hot springs. 

Took hours via a mini carriage, cable car & hiked up to see this amazing pools. Almost 4000m or 9000ft above sea level, the high altitude makes me breathless at times & need an oxygen tank but the view is worth it

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #黄龙 #四川 #chinatravel #huanglong #travelblogger

transcription.text: ឡូក្រើង្អាតារមប្ម។ ហើលានបិល្ត្ល្យពា។ ស្រូវហ្ពាលាលើម។
